[[File:Dark bow (Last Man Standing) detail.png|left|150px]]
The '''dark bow''' from [[Last Man Standing]] is a minigame-exclusive variant of the normal [[dark bow]]. It can be obtained (along with 5,000 [[Dragon arrow (Last Man Standing)|dragon arrows]]) from opening the [[Chest (Last Man Standing)|chests]] with a [[bloody key]] or [[bloodier key]], or looting the [[Crate (Last Man Standing)|crates]] that spawn at random locations on the map. It is dropped on death to whoever killed you.

It fires two arrows per attack, and has an [[attack range]] of 10 (unaffected by longrange).

==Special attack==
The dark bow has a unique [[special attack]] comprised of two different attacks, both of which consume 55% of the player's special attack energy.
[[File:Descent of Dragons.gif|thumb|300px|A player performing one of the dark bow's special attacks, ''Descent of Dragons''.]]
The 1st special attack, ''Descent of Darkness'', deals up to 30% more damage with a minimum of 5 damage per arrow. The animation shows two arrows fired at the target, surrounded in a black shroud.

If the player has [[dragon arrow]]s equipped, the 2nd special attack, ''Descent of Dragons'', is used instead. This attack deals up to 50% more damage with a minimum of 8 damage per arrow, while capping the max hit at 48 damage per arrow.{{CiteForum|author = Mod Ronan|url = http://services.runescape.com/m=news/architectural-alliance?oldschool=1|title = Architectural Alliance|forum = Old School RuneScape|postdate = March 3, 2016}}
The animation shows two [[black dragon]] heads fired at the target.
